meanings.definition: A reel; a device around which thread, wire or cable is wound, especially a cylinder or spindle.
To wind on a spool or spools.
(heading) A pile.
To arrange in a stack, or to add to an existing stack.
meanings.example: Please stack those chairs in the corner.

meanings.definition: Protuberance, air pressure
To swell; protuberate; bulge or spread out.

STUNT.definition: A daring or dangerous feat, often involving the display of gymnastic skills.

meanings.definition: A daring or dangerous feat, often involving the display of gymnastic skills.
(cheerleading) To perform a stunt.
A blemish.
To soil or stain; to dirty.
meanings.example: He did not wish to sully his hands with gardening.

SUMAC.definition: Any of various shrubs or small trees of the genus Rhus and other genera in Anacardiaceae, particularly the elm-leaved sumac, Sicilian sumac, or tanner's sumac (Rhus coriaria).

meanings.definition: Any of various shrubs or small trees of the genus Rhus and other genera in Anacardiaceae, particularly the elm-leaved sumac, Sicilian sumac, or tanner's sumac (Rhus coriaria).
To apply a preparation of sumac to (an object), for example, to a piece of leather to tan it.

SURGE.definition: A sudden transient rush, flood or increase.
SURGE.example: He felt a surge of excitement.

meanings.definition: A sudden transient rush, flood or increase.
meanings.example: He felt a surge of excitement.

meanings.definition: To rush, flood, or increase suddenly.
meanings.example: Toaster sales surged last year.

SWING.definition: The manner in which something is swung.
SWING.example: Door swing indicates direction the door opens.

meanings.definition: The manner in which something is swung.
meanings.example: Door swing indicates direction the door opens.

meanings.definition: To rotate about an off-centre fixed point.
meanings.example: The plant swung in the breeze.

SWOOP.definition: An instance, or the act of suddenly plunging downward.
SWOOP.example: The quality of decision is like the well-timed swoop of a falcon which enables it to strike and destroy its victim. – Sun Tzu

meanings.definition: An instance, or the act of suddenly plunging downward.
meanings.example: The quality of decision is like the well-timed swoop of a falcon which enables it to strike and destroy its victim. – Sun Tzu

meanings.definition: To fly or glide downwards suddenly; to plunge (in the air) or nosedive.
meanings.example: The lone eagle swooped down into the lake, snatching its prey, a small fish.

TABBY.definition: A kind of waved silk, usually called watered silk, manufactured like taffeta, but thicker and stronger. The watering is given to it by calendering.

meanings.definition: A kind of waved silk, usually called watered silk, manufactured like taffeta, but thicker and stronger. The watering is given to it by calendering.
To give a wavy or watered appearance to (a textile).

TEETH.definition: The ability to be enforced, or to be enforced to any useful effect.
TEETH.example: The international community's sanctions against the regime had some teeth to them this time around.

meanings.definition: The ability to be enforced, or to be enforced to any useful effect.
meanings.example: The international community's sanctions against the regime had some teeth to them this time around.

meanings.definition: To grow teeth.
meanings.example: Babies typically start teething at about six months.

THICK.definition: The thickest, or most active or intense, part of something.
THICK.example: It was mayhem in the thick of battle.

meanings.definition: The thickest, or most active or intense, part of something.
meanings.example: It was mayhem in the thick of battle.

meanings.definition: To thicken.

TINGE.definition: A small added amount of colour; (by extension) a small added amount of some other thing.

meanings.definition: A small added amount of colour; (by extension) a small added amount of some other thing.
To add a small amount of colour; to tint; (by extension) to add a small amount of some other thing.

TRIAL.definition: An opportunity to test something out; a test.
TRIAL.example: They will perform the trials for the new equipment next week.

meanings.definition: An opportunity to test something out; a test.
meanings.example: They will perform the trials for the new equipment next week.

meanings.definition: To carry out a series of tests on (a new product, procedure etc.) before marketing or implementing it.
meanings.example: The warning system was extensively trialed before being fitted to all our vehicles.

TRUCK.definition: A small wheel or roller, specifically the wheel of a gun carriage.

meanings.definition: A small wheel or roller, specifically the wheel of a gun carriage.
To drive a truck: Generally a truck driver's slang.

TUBER.definition: A fleshy, thickened underground stem of a plant, usually containing stored starch, for example a potato or arrowroot.

meanings.definition: A fleshy, thickened underground stem of a plant, usually containing stored starch, for example a potato or arrowroot.

TULIP.definition: A type of flowering plant, genus Tulipa.

meanings.definition: A type of flowering plant, genus Tulipa.

VEGAN.definition: A person who does not eat, drink or otherwise consume any animal products

meanings.definition: A person who does not eat, drink or otherwise consume any animal products
(of a product or practice, especially food) Not containing animal products (meat, eggs, milk, leather, etc) or inherently involving animal use.
meanings.example: He eats a completely vegan diet.

VENUE.definition: A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.

meanings.definition: A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.

VOWEL.definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.

meanings.definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.
To add vowel points to a consonantal script (e.g. niqqud in Hebrew or harakat in Arabic)

WAIST.definition: The part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach.

meanings.definition: The part of the body between the pelvis and the stomach.
Grown.

WEIGH.definition: To determine the weight of an object.

meanings.definition: To determine the weight of an object.

WHITE.definition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.

meanings.definition: The color/colour of snow or milk; the colour of light containing equal amounts of all visible wavelengths.

meanings.definition: To command, rule over; to possess or own.

WOUND.definition: An injury, such as a cut, stab, or tear, to a (usually external) part of the body.

meanings.definition: An injury, such as a cut, stab, or tear, to a (usually external) part of the body.
To hurt or injure (someone) by cutting, piercing, or tearing the skin.
